info.title: Telerik.CLI
info.description: Unified command-line interface for Telerik products and services.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: Command.Parse, OK: Command.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: ParseResult.Invoke, OK: ParseErrorAction.Invoke, OK: HelpAction.Invoke, OK: ParseResult.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Telerik CLI - Unified command-line interface for Telerik products and services

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information

commands.name: get-key
commands.description: Fetch and save Telerik license key.

options.name: --json
options.description: Output result as JSON. [default: False]

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Enable verbose diagnostic output written to stderr. [default: False]

options.name: --no-browser
options.description: Skip the browser-based login and use manual redirect URL entry instead. Use this in environments where the loopback redirect is blocked (e.g. firewall, antivirus, WSL, corporate proxy). [default: False]

commands.name: config
commands.description: Register MCP servers in IDE configuration files. Omit --ide and product to configure all combinations.

options.name: --json
options.description: Output result as JSON. [default: False]

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Enable verbose diagnostic output written to stderr. [default: False]

options.name: --ide
options.description: Target IDE. Known values: visualstudio, vscode, cursor. Omit to target all IDEs.

arguments.name: product
arguments.description: Product to register. Known values: blazor. Omit to register all products.

options.name: --json
options.description: Output result as JSON. [default: False]

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Enable verbose diagnostic output written to stderr. [default: False]

options.name: --scope
options.description: Scope: 'user' or 'project'. [default: user]

options.name: --path
options.description: Path to NuGet.config or project directory (required for project scope).

options.name: --api-key
options.description: Telerik NuGet API key (auto-generated if not provided).

options.name: --force
options.description: Override existing credentials even if already configured. [default: False]

options.name: --no-browser
options.description: Skip the browser-based login and use manual redirect URL entry instead. Use this in environments where the loopback redirect is blocked (e.g. firewall, antivirus, WSL, corporate proxy). [default: False]

commands.name: login
commands.description: Login via browser and persist login session.

options.name: --json
options.description: Output result as JSON. [default: False]

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Enable verbose diagnostic output written to stderr. [default: False]

options.name: --no-browser
options.description: Skip the browser-based login and use manual redirect URL entry instead. Use this in environments where the loopback redirect is blocked (e.g. firewall, antivirus, WSL, corporate proxy). [default: False]

options.name: --json
options.description: Output result as JSON. [default: False]

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Enable verbose diagnostic output written to stderr. [default: False]

commands.name: whoami
commands.description: Print basic info about the current login session.

options.name: --json
options.description: Output result as JSON. [default: False]

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Enable verbose diagnostic output written to stderr. [default: False]

commands.name: setup
commands.description: Run the full Telerik developer-machine setup: login -> NuGet config -> license key -> MCP config.

options.name: --json
options.description: Output result as JSON. [default: False]

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Enable verbose diagnostic output written to stderr. [default: False]

options.name: --scope
options.description: NuGet config scope: 'user' or 'project'. [default: user]

options.name: --nuget-path
options.description: Path to NuGet.config or project directory (required when --scope project).

options.name: --force
options.description: Override existing NuGet credentials even if already configured. [default: False]

options.name: --no-browser
options.description: Skip the browser-based login and use manual redirect URL entry instead. Use this in environments where the loopback redirect is blocked (e.g. firewall, antivirus, WSL, corporate proxy). [default: False]

options.name: --interactive
options.description: Run the setup flow interactively, prompting for each step. Each prompt shows its default value; pressing Enter accepts it. This is the default when stdin is a terminal. [default: False]

options.name: --no-interactive
options.description: Run the setup flow non-interactively, relying on explicit options or their built-in defaults. This is the default when stdin is redirected (e.g. in CI). [default: False]

arguments.name: product
arguments.description: Product to register for MCP. Known values: blazor. Omit to register all products.
